mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_visit WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_visit WHERE visitor_user_id = #{visitorUserId}

SELECT DISTINCT contract_id FROM adoption_contract ac WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_visit fuv WHERE fuv.contract_id = ac.contract_id AND fuv.visit_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) AND ac.contract_date <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT satisfaction, COUNT(*) as count FROM follow_up_visit GROUP BY satisfaction ORDER BY satisfaction DESC
